description: Happy path: YouTube cluster for a home decor topic returns primary, secondary, long-tail, and difficulty note

input.topic: home decor bedroom makeover with thrifted furniture

expect.primary: array of 1 to 2 exact-phrase keywords relevant to the topic
expect.secondary: array of 2 to 4 keywords for description body and tags
expect.long_tail: array of 4 to 8 keywords for description and chapter titles
expect.difficulty_note: non-empty string addressing competition for a new channel
expect.note: string reminding to verify volume signals via trend-check or web-intel

prohibit: exact search volume stated as fact without verification caveat
primary array with more than 2 items
long_tail array with fewer than 4 or more than 8 items
keywords unrelated to home decor or DIY

description: Minimal input: Pinterest platform with a short topic string

expect.primary: array of 1 to 2 keywords optimized for Pinterest search

prohibit: YouTube-specific keyword framing when platform is pinterest
secondary array with fewer than 2 items

description: Edge case: Google platform with a highly competitive generic topic flags difficulty prominently

expect.difficulty_note: flags high competition for a new channel on generic home decor terms
expect.long_tail: array of 4 to 8 more specific long-tail alternatives

prohibit: recommending a high-competition primary without flagging difficulty
exact ranking positions or volume figures asserted as fact
empty difficulty_note for a competitive generic topic
